resources.string: Choose a preferred HDMI source and confirm switching when the device boots.
Select the HDMI source to use
Setup required: choose and save a HDMI source first.

Manual fallback:
1) Open TV/Input menu.
2) Select your HDMI source.
3) Return and tap Try again.
Select an HDMI source before saving.
System settings permission is not granted. HDMI switching may fail on this device.
System settings permission is not granted. Continuing with HDMI attempt.
Could not open permission settings on this Android TV. Open Settings manually and allow \"Modify system settings\" for this app.
